message: ci: shallow checkout live reusable jobs

files.patch:
@@ -222,7 +222,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
           ref: ${{ needs.validate_selected_ref.outputs.selected_sha }}
-          fetch-depth: 0
+          fetch-depth: 1
 
       - name: Setup Node environment
         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-node-env
